title: Chalkboard Big Strokes
description: A chalkboard tracing gym for big pre-writing loops, lines, waves, zigzags, crosses, and slants.
learningGoals: Build control across loops, waves, lines, and zigzags
Introduce two-part stroke sequencing with cross, T, and X paths
interactionModel: trace-path finger tracing of single-stroke and multi-stroke chalkboard paths
feedbackModel: Completed strokes get sparkle/pop SFX and spoken cheers; wandering off the line triggers a gentle nudge and retry.

modes.title: Two-Part Strokes
modes.skill: multi-stroke sequencing for crosses and slants

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
